log_to_rec709.name: LOG to Rec.709
log_to_rec709.description: Expands LOG gamma to Rec.709 display standard. Use as first step in chain for LOG-encoded footage.

neutral_normalize.name: AI Footage Normalize
neutral_normalize.description: Subtle normalization for AI-generated footage. Evens out banding, slight level balance. Apply before creative grade.

kodak_vision3_500t.name: Kodak Vision3 500T
kodak_vision3_500t.description: Tungsten cinema standard. Warm highlights, rich shadows, organic feel. The most-used cinema negative stock.

kodak_vision3_250d.name: Kodak Vision3 250D
kodak_vision3_250d.description: Daylight cinema negative. Vibrant color, moderate grain, excellent for outdoor scenes.

fuji_eterna_vivid_500.name: Fuji Eterna Vivid 500
fuji_eterna_vivid_500.description: Punchy color rendition. Strong saturation, vivid greens and blues. Great for exteriors.

fuji_eterna_250d.name: Fuji Eterna 250D
fuji_eterna_250d.description: Neutral daylight stock. Natural skin tones, moderate saturation. Professional baseline.

kodak_ektachrome_100d.name: Kodak Ektachrome 100D
kodak_ektachrome_100d.description: Reversal film. Highly saturated, punchy contrast. Direct positive look.

kodak_trix_400_bw.name: Kodak Tri-X 400 B&W
kodak_trix_400_bw.description: Classic black and white. Visible grain, high contrast. Photojournalism standard.

ilford_hp5_bw.name: Ilford HP5 Plus B&W
ilford_hp5_bw.description: Fine-grain B&W. Smoother tonal range, wider latitude. Elegant monochrome.

kodak_doublex_5222_bw.name: Kodak Double-X 5222 B&W
kodak_doublex_5222_bw.description: Cinema B&W. Deep blacks, crisp whites, high contrast. The Lighthouse, Raging Bull.

16mm_reversal_vintage.name: 16mm Reversal Vintage
16mm_reversal_vintage.description: 16mm reversal with warm fade, heavy grain character. Vintage documentary texture.

super_8mm_home_movie.name: Super 8mm Home Movie
super_8mm_home_movie.description: Extreme warmth, heavy fade, low contrast. Nostalgic home movie aesthetic.

technicolor_3strip.name: Technicolor 3-Strip
technicolor_3strip.description: Golden age Hollywood. Vivid saturated dye transfer color. Wizard of Oz, Singin' in the Rain.

bleach_bypass.name: Bleach Bypass
bleach_bypass.description: Desaturated, high contrast. Silver retention. War/thriller aesthetic.

cross_process.name: Cross Processing
cross_process.description: Extreme color shifts, high saturation. Experimental, fashion, music video.

faded_film_aged.name: Faded Film Aged
faded_film_aged.description: Lifted blacks, desaturated. Aged vintage stock look.

teal_orange_blockbuster.name: Teal Orange Blockbuster
teal_orange_blockbuster.description: Hollywood complementary grade. Warm skin tones, cool shadows.

desaturated_moody.name: Desaturated Moody
desaturated_moody.description: Pulled-back saturation, lifted blacks. Contemplative indie look.

high_contrast_bw.name: High Contrast B&W
high_contrast_bw.description: Aggressive black and white. Crushed blacks, blown highlights.

day_for_night.name: Day for Night
day_for_night.description: Makes daylight footage appear nighttime. Blue push, lowered exposure.

split_tone_warm_shadows.name: Split Tone Warm Shadows
split_tone_warm_shadows.description: Warm orange shadows, cool blue highlights. Editorial split tone.
